arts.ttl: Preview: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Heidenheim - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Bayer Leverkusen and Heidenheim, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Boniface misses Leverkusen training amid injury reports
arts.sum: Victor Boniface wasn't in training for Bayer Leverkusen on Thursday amid reports he suffered an injury on international duty with Nigeria.

arts.ttl: Florian Wirtz: 'Favourites' to sign Man City, Real Madrid, Liverpool-linked star 'revealed'
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly leading Real Madrid, Liverpool and Bayern Munich in the race to sign Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz.

arts.ttl: Leverkusen have lost what won them last season's Bundesliga
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen had a knack for snatching late wins en route to a shock Bundesliga crown in 2023-24. That isn't happening this season, though.
